107     sql = f"""
108 WITH RECURSIVE _cypher_path AS (
109   -- Base case: direct edges (depth 1)
110   SELECT
111     CAST(src."{src_pk}" AS VARCHAR) AS _start_id,
112     CAST(tgt."{tgt_pk}" AS VARCHAR) AS _end_id,
113     CAST(src."{src_pk}" AS VARCHAR) AS _path_id,
114     1 AS _depth,
115     'forward' AS _direction,
116     CAST(src."{src_pk}" AS VARCHAR) AS _visited
117   FROM {src_full} src
118   JOIN {tgt_full} tgt ON {src_join_expr} = tgt."{tgt_id_col}"
119   WHERE _depth <= {effective_max}
120 
121   UNION ALL
122 
123   -- Recursive case: extend paths
124   SELECT
125     p._start_id,
126     CAST(tgt."{tgt_pk}" AS VARCHAR) AS _end_id,
127     p._path_id,
128     p._depth + 1 AS _depth,
129     'forward' AS _direction,
130     p._visited || ',' || CAST(tgt."{tgt_pk}" AS VARCHAR) AS _visited
131   FROM _cypher_path p
132   JOIN {tgt_full} tgt ON p._end_id = CAST(tgt."{tgt_id_col}" AS VARCHAR)
133   WHERE p._depth < {effective_max}
134     AND p._visited NOT LIKE '%,' || CAST(tgt."{tgt_pk}" AS VARCHAR) || ',%'
135     AND p._visited NOT LIKE CAST(tgt."{tgt_pk}" AS VARCHAR) || ',%'
136     AND p._visited NOT LIKE '%,' || CAST(tgt."{tgt_pk}" AS VARCHAR)
137     AND p._visited != CAST(tgt."{tgt_pk}" AS VARCHAR)
138 )
139 """
